## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `npm run ci`
- [ ] I verified local health endpoints (`/health` and `/api/health`) when relevant
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed

## Security / Governance checks

- [ ] No secrets or credentials were added
- [ ] Changes to `.github/workflows`, `packages/gateway`, or deployment files have maintainer review
- [ ] I understand merge requires maintainer approval per CODEOWNERS

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR is scoped and reviewable
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented
